command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 "cat > /tmp/pull_model.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
curl -s -X POST http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/pull -d '{"name":"qwen3.5:9b"}' -o /tmp/pull_output.txt &
echo pull_started_pid=$!
SHEOF
chmod +x /tmp/pull_model.sh && bash /tmp/pull_model.sh"
